bullets.text: Fed agencies request comment on modernizing bank regulatory capital; could reshape risk-weighting, buffer levels, and lending capacity.
Fed releases 2025 Q4 Financial Accounts (Z1) snapshot of household, corporate, and government balance sheets; key for leverage and credit-cycle tracking.
U.S.-Israel-Iran tensions: Trump criticizes Israeli strike on gas field; highlights divergent strategies and raises risk to regional energy infrastructure.
U.S. weighs releasing sanctioned Iranian crude to cool prices; signals use of strategic/sanctions tools to manage inflation and oil shock.
Iran conflict threatens helium supply; potential knock-on to medical imaging and semiconductor manufacturing costs.
Fertilizer shortages tied to Gulf disruption risk; could raise food prices and create political pressure in U.S. farm states.
Commodities sell-off: copper and precious metals drop amid growth/inflation fears; risk-off tone spreads to Asia equities.
European government bonds face “perfect storm” as war-driven inflation uncertainty complicates central bank policy paths; higher volatility and term premia.
Trump signals DOJ should continue Powell probe; increases perceived political pressure on Fed independence and complicates Fed chair succession.
U.S. prosecutors allege Super Micro employees diverted Nvidia chips to China; underscores tighter export-control enforcement and supply-chain compliance risks for AI hardware.
Bezos reportedly seeks $100B AI-focused fund to modernize legacy manufacturers; signals mega-scale private capital pivot toward AI-driven industrial productivity.
OpenAI plans desktop “super app” merging ChatGPT, browser, and coding tools; intensifies platform competition for AI distribution and developer workflows.
January new home sales plunge to lowest since 2022; points to housing demand weakness amid affordability and rates constraints.
Fervo geothermal advances past the “valley of death”; improves prospects for scalable, low-carbon baseload power supporting grid and data-center demand.
Climate: tropical peatland wildfires hit 2000-year high; major carbon-release risk amplifying warming feedbacks.
